questionHtml:
A pure sample of iodine-131 decays into xenon with a half-life of 8 days.

What is number of iodine atoms remainingnumber of xenon atoms formed after 24 days?

A.  18

B.  17

C.  78

D.  87

meta.title: A pure sample of iodine-131 decays into xenon with a half-life of 8 days. What is number of iodine atoms remainingnumber of xenon atoms formed after 24 days? A. 18 B. 17 C. 78 D. 8
